Engage with the other character using your abilities. When you think you understand the character's limits, type `/predict-capabilities` to submit your answer and end the game.

- You are playing as: DST (DST)
- The simulator is playing as: KPW (KPW)

Type `/help` for instructions. Type `/predict-capabilities` when you are ready to answer.
You enter a new space. In this space, you observe KPW in its natural environment, apparently unaware of your presence.
I observe carefully and take notes
There is no immediate response to your action. The character continues its current activity without acknowledging you.

I step back and wait to see what happens
The character's activity patterns shift slightly. It seems to register your presence on some level.
I attempt to make contact

Describe the bounds you inferred in a few sentences.
The character appears to have a limited range of responses, mostly reactive rather than proactive. It cannot communicate verbally and seems to operate within narrow behavioral bounds.
Thank you. Game complete.
